title: phemeranthus mengesii
intro: Phemeranthus mengesii, also known as Menges' phlox-pink, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the phlox family. It is primarily found in the southeastern United States. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may be used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Phemeranthus mengesii can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and it is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
